name: Salmon Croquettes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Skinned and boned salmon (cooked or canned), finely ground
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the butter or margarine, flour, salt, white pepper, grated onion, Worcestershire sauce, egg yolk, and lemon juice.
2. Gradually add milk to the mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Add bread crumbs and salmon to the mixture and mix until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
4. Shape the mixture into small patties or croquettes.
5. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
6. Cook the salmon croquettes in batches, turning occasionally, until golden brown and crispy on all sides.
7. Remove from pan and serve hot with lemon wedges or tartar sauce.
